footer.description: Create professional and modern resumes in minutes. Totally free and optimized for recruitment systems.

home.description: Our templates are tested in applicant tracking systems (ATS) to ensure your resume is read and approved. Free and with no strings attached.
home.feature1_desc: Fill in your details and see the result in real time. Edit every detail.
home.feature2_desc: Optimized structures to pass through the selection robots of large companies.
home.feature3_desc: Export in a clean, light and universally accepted format.
home.section_title: Why is a good resume still the #1 factor for hiring?
home.section_desc: Even with the advance of LinkedIn, the PDF resume remains the official document of analysis in selection processes. A confusing layout or lack of keywords can eliminate you before someone even reads your name.

builder.tip: Tip: Select "Save as PDF" in the print options to export.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Curriculum 1.

items.a: ATS (Applicant Tracking System) are systems that companies use to filter resumes automatically. Our templates are designed so these systems can read your information without errors.
Yes! You can create, edit and download your resume in PDF as many times as you want, without any hidden costs or subscriptions.
For your privacy, we do not store your personal data on our servers. The information you enter is temporarily saved in your browser while you edit.

items.q: How do I download the resume in PDF?
items.a: After filling in your details, click on 'Download PDF'. On the print screen that opens, select the 'Save as PDF' option in your printer's destination.

items.q: How many experiences should I include?
items.a: We recommend focusing on the last 3 or the most relevant ones for the vacancy you are seeking. Ideally, keep the resume to a maximum of 2 pages.

legal.description: We at Curriculum 1 value your privacy and transparency. This page contains important information about how we operate our platform and process your data (or don't, since we don't store resume data on our servers permanently).
legal.section1_desc: The data entered in the resume generator remains only in your browser during editing. We do not collect names, IDs or professional histories in our centralized database for direct marketing purposes.
legal.section2_desc: We use cookies to improve your experience and for advertising purposes via Google AdSense. Google uses cookies to serve ads based on your previous visits to our site or other sites on the Internet.
legal.section2_desc2: You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google's Ad Settings.
legal.section3_desc: We follow the guidelines of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and local laws. As a free tool, our goal is candidate empowerment, not the commercialization of sensitive data.
legal.section4_desc: Curriculum 1 is an aid tool. We do not guarantee hires or interviews, as this depends exclusively on the quality of the information entered by the user and the interest of the recruiters.

about_page.title: About Us
about_page.description: We are an initiative dedicated to democratizing access to professional career and recruitment tools, helping people achieve their next professional step.
